mapper.select: SELECT id, username, type FROM t_user_auth WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, type, password_hash FROM t_user_auth WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, username, password_hash, type, token_version, login_fail_count, locked_until FROM t_user_auth WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT id, username, type, token_version FROM t_user_auth WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND type IN (1, 2) AND (locked_until IS NULL OR locked_until <= #{now})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_auth SET locked_until = CASE WHEN login_fail_count + 1 >= #{maxAttempts} THEN #{lockedUntil} ELSE NULL END, login_fail_count = CASE WHEN login_fail_count + 1 >= #{maxAttempts} THEN 0 ELSE login_fail_count + 1 END, updated_at = #{failedAt}, updated_by = NULL WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND (locked_until IS NULL OR locked_until <= #{failedAt})

UPDATE t_user_auth SET last_login_at = #{loggedInAt}, last_login_ip = #{clientIp}, login_fail_count = 0, locked_until = NULL, updated_at = #{loggedInAt}, updated_by = #{userId} WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND (locked_until IS NULL OR locked_until <= #{loggedInAt})
UPDATE t_user_auth SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, token_version = token_version + 1, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
